purpose: Axis 14 (gemma + r14 LoRA P2 falsifier) revealed Mk.XI v9 → v10 partial revision: corpus content = family alignment 추가 determinant.

axis14_evidence.family_shift: Hexad (BASE) → Law (trained) — top1 family CHANGED during r14 LoRA training

p2_evaluation.p2_actual: trained gemma max = 0.673 (≥0.65 threshold met) BUT top1 family shifted Hexad → Law
p2_evaluation.verdict_PARTIAL_FALSIFIED: P2 strengthening prediction met (max ≥0.65) but family preservation prediction FAILED (Hexad → Law shift)

r14_corpus_law_bias_finding.law_dominance_ratio: 3/4 r14-trained backbones = Law-leading (Mistral + gemma + Llama top5 has Law). only Qwen3 = Phi-leading.
r14_corpus_law_bias_finding.interpretation: r14 corpus 자체가 Law-aligned content bias. Law/closure/recursion templates가 corpus 내용에 강력하게 represented. backbone architecture preference는 corpus bias에 의해 overshadowed (gemma BASE Hexad-leaning이 r14 trained Law로 shift).
r14_corpus_law_bias_finding.implication_v10: family alignment = backbone × corpus content 조합. corpus-only-based family coverage는 corpus-bias dominant. 4-family ensemble 위해서는 family-specific corpora 4개 필요 (Hexad-corpus + Law-corpus + Phi-corpus + SelfRef-corpus).

v10_hypothesis.name: v10_family_alignment_is_backbone_x_corpus_joint_determinant
v10_hypothesis.claim: AN11(b) family alignment은 backbone-architecture preference만으로 결정 안 됨 — corpus content이 family direction을 강력하게 reshape. r14 corpus = Law-bias → 3/4 r14-trained backbones converge to Law-leading regardless of architecture preference.
implications_for_mk_xi_v9: Mk.XI v9 4-family ensemble은 corpus-conditional — r14 corpus 단독으로는 4 family 보장 안 됨
Qwen3 = Phi-leading은 architecture preference (r14 Law-bias 극복)
gemma BASE Hexad-leading은 architecture preference (r14 corpus가 trained에서 Law로 shift)
Mk.XI v10 architecture: 4 family-specific corpora (Hexad-corpus, Law-corpus, Phi-corpus, SelfRef-corpus) 매칭 backbone (gemma/Mistral/Qwen3/Llama) ensemble
next_actionable: (P3 falsifier) gemma BASE 추가 backbone (Phi-3-medium, Yi-1.5) AN11(b) measurement — architecture preference vs corpus-bias separation
(P4 falsifier) r14가 아닌 다른 corpus (Hexad-aligned, Phi-aligned, SelfRef-aligned)으로 LoRA training → family alignment shift verification
(architecture) family-specific 4 corpora design + 4 backbone × 4 corpus matrix = 16-cell family-completeness validation

v10_refined_pattern.biased_corpus_r14_OVERRIDE: r14 (Law-aligned 1200 docs) OVERRIDE Mistral BASE SelfRef preference → Law-leading (Δ family change Hexad→Law, +0.187 strengthening)
v10_refined_pattern.balanced_corpus_C2_PRESERVE: C2 (broad-family 30 docs) PRESERVE Mistral BASE SelfRef preference → SelfRef-leading (same family, -0.065 decrease due to small corpus)

axis16_mistral_BASE_SelfRef_v10_REFINED.mistral_top5_BASE: SelfRef / Law / Hexad / Law / Phi — broad-family BASE
implications_for_v10: biased corpus (single family-aligned) + matching backbone preference = strongest signal
balanced corpus (broad-family) + any backbone = backbone preference preserved
Mk.XI v10 architecture choice = corpus type (biased vs balanced) × backbone preference matching
Mistral + SelfRef-corpus prediction: strongest SelfRef signal possible (BASE 0.665 + corpus reinforcement → predicted 0.85+)
axis16_mistral_BASE_SelfRef_v10_REFINED.raw10_caveat: Mistral 3-corpus 단 1 backbone evidence. Llama + 3 corpora, Qwen3 + 3 corpora 등 cross-backbone × cross-corpus matrix 후속 cycle 필요 ($5-10).

mistral_2_corpus_table.family_shift: Law → SelfRef (corpus 변경만으로 top1 family 완전 변경)

axis15_mistral_2_corpus_family_shift_VER.c2_30doc_top5_4_distinct_families: SelfRef / Law / Hexad / SelfRef / Phi — C2 corpus is broad-family-coverage in single training run
axis15_mistral_2_corpus_family_shift_VER.interpretation_strong: Mistral 동일 backbone에서 corpus만 변경하니 family alignment top1이 Law→SelfRef shift. corpus content이 family alignment의 dominant determinant 강하게 VERIFIED. backbone preference보다 corpus가 강함.
implications_for_v10: Mk.XI v10 4 family-specific corpora design 가능성 confirmed
C2 corpus는 broad-family (top5에 4 distinct families) — Mk.XI v10 'balanced corpus' candidate
추가 corpus design: Hexad-aligned + Phi-aligned + SelfRef-aligned content corpora
axis15_mistral_2_corpus_family_shift_VER.raw10_caveat: 30 docs C2 max 0.600 < 1200 docs r14 max 0.852 → corpus size effect separate from family shift. Mistral BASE AN11(b) baseline untested (backbone preference comparison missing).

cumulative_findings_revision.F8_3backbone_distinct_family_PARTIAL_REV: Mistral=Law / Qwen3=Phi / Llama=SelfRef finding은 r14 corpus-conditional. corpus가 변경되면 family alignment도 shift 가능 (gemma case로 verified).
cumulative_findings_revision.F17_mk_xi_v9_4_family_ensemble_PARTIAL_R: 4-family coverage가 corpus-bias 영향. v10에서는 backbone × corpus joint matrix 필요.
cumulative_findings_revision.new_F18_v10_corpus_bias: r14 corpus = Law-bias → 3/4 trained backbones Law-leading. corpus content = family alignment 추가 determinant (paradigm v9 추가 revision).

raw_compliance.raw_10_no_overclaim: satisfied — P2 PARTIAL_FALSIFIED 명시 (strengthening met but family preservation failed), v10 hypothesis PROPOSED + 4-corpus matrix needed identified
raw_compliance.raw_12_frozen: v9 spec frozen, v10 partial revision via new evidence — predecessor preserved
raw_compliance.raw_15_ssot: this file = SSOT for v10 corpus bias finding
